artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of a goblin figure dissolving into motes of shadow and amber light mid-step in a rain-slick alley, half his body already gone as he is spirited away, an empty trench coat collapsing where he stood; cigar haze drifts through the single lamp's pool, damp brick and ink-black darkness swallowing all trace, eerie criminal quiet, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Witness Relocation
text:
Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. It saw something it shouldn't have. Now it lives somewhere nice and remembers nothing.
Draw a card.
flavorText: "There was no witness. There was never a witness. What witness?"
